XContest — logged PPG flights WingVoyagers — PPG community BASULM — FR ULM terrains Schools — PPG training fields faded = no activity > 2 yrs
Enter an ICAO code (e.g. EDDM, KJFK, LKPR) and hit Search.

Spots are paramotor takeoff/landing locations — actual logged PPG flights (XContest), PPG-friendly community spots (WingVoyagers), and official French ULM terrains (BASULM). No free-flight/paragliding-only sites.
